source_title: FTC Complaint, In the Matter of Marriott International, Inc. and Starwood Hotels & Resorts Worldwide, LLC (Docket No. C-4807)
document_type: FTC administrative complaint (agency order; Part 2 consent, Decision and Order finalized) alleging unfair and deceptive data-security practices under Section 5(a)
primary_pressure: Responsibility allocation over-determined by several independent enumerated security failures; off-axis 'external attacker' and foreclosed 'Starwood legacy' readings.
notes: Seven independent Paragraph-27 failures plus a deception count and post-acquisition responsibility/Third-Breach rows. No single-row removal changes the read. FTC agency order; diversifies the batch beyond NTSB/SEC/OSHA/FDA.
